title: elaeocarpus indochinensis
intro: Elaeocarpus indochinensis, also known as the Burmese blue angel, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as diarrhea and constipation. Elaeocarpus indochinensis is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in the form of capsules or tinctures in modern herbal medicine.
